message:
feat(tools): add reply_message recipient validation and refine guard/storage/static files

messaging.rs: Extract has_any_recipients() helper and add early-return
validation in reply_message to reject replies with no recipients at all
(empty to + cc + bcc). Previously this could reach the delivery loop
with zero recipients causing a silent no-op. Includes unit tests for
the edge cases.

guard/lib.rs, static_files.rs, storage/lib.rs, build_slots.rs,
reservations.rs: Refinements from concurrent agent work including
improved error handling, code formatting, and test coverage additions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
